items.notes: Phase 7 budget-aware reviewer fallback is implemented locally and PR #28 is ready for governance review.

Merged via PR #35 on 2026-03-27. Stage 6 approved. 5 UI states, state transition tests (Vitest), login gate return-to-action verified. Design Status confirmed. Slice-03 Playwright E2E spec now covers logged-in like/unlike, pending disabled state, and simulated login return-to-action. Live OAuth smoke remains manual-only by design.

Merged via PR #61 and PR #64 on 2026-04-01 after human verification, with roadmap closeout corrected in PR #69. Closeout sync backfill on 2026-04-02 restored README/acceptance/workflow-v2 alignment and expanded slice-05 planner coverage for loading/error states, column CRUD, status badges, scroll range shift, and guest return-to-action.
